name: Recruitment Auth - Local

values.description: Base URL of the running server (npm run dev)
JWT access token — auto-populated by Login request
Admin JWT access token — auto-populated by Login (Admin) request
CSRF token — auto-fetched before every POST/PATCH by the collection pre-request script
Logged-in user's own ID — auto-populated by Get My Profile. Used for self-lockout guard test.
A non-admin user ID for admin tests — auto-populated by List All Users
Temporary 2FA token — auto-populated by Login when 2FA is required
Current 6-digit TOTP code from Google Authenticator / Authy — MANUALLY SET THIS before running 2FA requests
Email verification token from the verify-email link — MANUALLY SET: copy the 'token' query param from the email link
Password reset token from the reset-password link — MANUALLY SET: copy the 'token' query param from the email link
TOTP manual entry key — auto-populated by Setup 2FA. Use this to manually add to an authenticator app.

description:
Local development environment for the Recruitment Auth API.

## How tokens flow
- **accessToken**: Set automatically after Login / Verify 2FA / Refresh Token
- **adminAccessToken**: Set automatically after Login (Admin)
- **csrfToken**: Fetched automatically before every POST/PATCH by the collection pre-request script
- **userId**: Set automatically by Get My Profile
- **targetUserId**: Set automatically by List All Users (picks first non-admin user)
- **tempToken**: Set automatically by Login when 2FA is enabled

## Manual values needed
- **emailVerifyToken**: Copy from the verification email link
- **passwordResetToken**: Copy from the password reset email link  
- **totpCode**: Current code from your authenticator app (expires every 30s)
